text: Super nice dude. Great cut. Will be coming back.

The place is clean, nice and all of the barbers look sharp and uniform. They work by appointment and accept walk-ins. Everyone is polite and friendly. Great experience! Treylan Barney Treylan did an amazing job. He made sure he understood what services & how I wanted my haircut, beard trim and shave done. He worked quickly, but wasn't rushed and carried on good conversation. If your a local, make him your go to! I was just visiting Flagstaff, but if I'm ever back here I will definitely make an appointment again.
Pretty fast and clean
Fun atmosphere, highly recommend Lucas Snodgrass Lucas was very nice and helpful for my appointment. Got it down exactly how I wanted, he is a valued member of the team!
Trey does an outstanding and precise job at cutting my hair. Definitely my guy when I go to flagstaff. 🔥
Super great guy. Gave a great haircut.
Very sociable and quick, did a great job with my hair
Lucas is your man for a haircut he will make you look fresh
Great and fast
Fresh fades every weekend!
Knows how to cut my hair making it look fresh. Great barber
Declan did a fantastic job. I look good and feel good. Fun guy to talk to when getting a cut while still crafting a professional grade haircut. Job very well done. Great dude too.
Goated cut
Always a great low fade. And a solid dude.
Declan is a skillful barber that never disappoints! Very precise with his haircuts and a great dude to talk to! 100% would recommend to anyone!

Declan gave me a great transformational cut, he took his time and wanted to make sure that I thought everything looked good. Great guy to talk to, felt like I’d known him a while even though it was my first cut with him.
Great skill lever. Professional. Easy to talk to and got the haircut I wanted.
Welcoming environment, def coming back Declan Faria Super helpful about figuring out where to go with the cut and showing the process, great job
Great spot, quick and easy Brandon Todacheenie Good quality and very precise with everything

I’ve been to Brandon about five times now, and every cut has been excellent. He consistently does a great job, and always remembers me when I come in, which means a lot. Great guy and highly recommended!
